prompt: A gritty black-and-white hard-boiled manga page in a high-contrast ink wash style, arranged as a single comic page with 9 distinct panels of varying sizes and diagonal borders. The main subject is a mysterious adult woman with black long messy hair, a curvy build, an off-shoulder dark knit dress or sweater, a choker necklace, and dangling cross earrings, portrayed as a noir antiheroine. Her face is intentionally obscured by shadow, blur, or framing in multiple panels, giving her an anonymous and dangerous presence. The page uses dramatic brush textures, rain-soaked urban grime, splattered ink, heavy blacks, and cinematic lighting. Panel 1 at the top left shows a nighttime city skyline under rain with glowing windows and the vertical Japanese narration text: 「この街はいつも雨が降っている」. Panel 2 at the top center is a bust portrait of the woman facing forward, hair spilling across her shoulders, with her face obscured. Panel 3 at the top right shows her from behind walking down a narrow alley or wet street, with the vertical text: 「あたしの名前は誰も知らない」. Panel 4 in the middle left is an extreme close-up of one eye with the vertical text: 「知ってるのは裏の顔だけ」. Panel 5 in the middle center-left shows an overhead urban scene of buildings or city blocks with the vertical text: 「金と嘘と裏切りがこの街のルール」. Panel 6 in the middle center-right shows a close-up of hands, money, or a violent underworld exchange with the vertical text: 「でもあたしはそのルールの外側で生きてる」. Panel 7 in the middle right is a dark partial close-up of the woman in shadow with the vertical text: 「守るものなんか最初からなかった」. Panel 8 at the lower left is a medium shot of the woman standing with folded arms, with the vertical text: 「あるのは譲れないたったひとつの信念だけ」, and below it a small inset panel of 2 people seated at a bar counter at night with bottles and dim lights, accompanied by the vertical text: 「夜が明けるまでに片をつける」. Panel 9, the dominant lower-right panel, shows the woman aiming a handgun directly at the viewer in extreme foreshortening, hair whipping, body angled forward, with bold large vertical Japanese text split across the panel: 「あたしの正義は」 and 「あたしが決める」. Keep all visible text in Japanese exactly as written. Emphasize a seinen crime manga aesthetic, hard-boiled female vigilante energy, wet neon-noir atmosphere, rough pen lines, ink splatter, and dramatic panel composition.
